description: False-colour infrared satellite imagery depicting a rural landscape. The dominant colour is a deep red, indicative of dense, healthy vegetation such as forest, covering the majority of the image, particularly the eastern and western edges. Scattered throughout the central and northern parts are irregular-shaped patches of light green and yellowish tones, which represent agricultural fields, pastures, or open clearings. Within these light green areas, and also along their edges, are several small, irregular features in light blue or cyan, which could represent bare soil, sparse vegetation, or water bodies. Thin, winding, light-coloured linear features are visible, connecting the light green patches and traversing the red vegetated areas, suggesting the presence of roads or tracks. No specific geographic location, scale, or date is provided.
